queries.question: Show me the opportunities each career pathway has available.
queries.sql: SELECT Opportunities.Value  from Career_Pathways_Opportunities join Opportunities on Career_Pathways_Opportunities.OpportunityID = Opportunities.OpportunityID join Career_Pathways on Career_Pathways_Opportunities.CareerPathwayID = Career_Pathways.PathwayID   GROUP BY Career_Pathways_Opportunities.OpportunityID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Career_Pathways_Opportunities.CareerPathwayID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Career_Pathways)

queries.question: Show me the opportunities each career pathway has available.
queries.sql: select career_pathways.name , opportunities.value from Career_Pathways_Opportunities join Opportunities on Career_Pathways_Opportunities.OpportunityID = Opportunities.OpportunityID join Career_Pathways on Career_Pathways_Opportunities.CareerPathwayID = Career_Pathways.PathwayID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?value WHERE {
  ?career_pathways_opportunities a :Career_Pathways_Opportunities .
  ?opportunities a :Opportunities .
  ?career_pathways_opportunities p:hasOpportunities ?opportunities .
  ?career_pathways a :Career_Pathways .
  ?career_pathways_opportunities p:hasCareer_Pathways ?career_pathways .
  ?career_pathways p:name ?name .
  ?opportunities p:Value ?value .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the opportunities each career pathway has available.
